title: carex × ilseana
intro: Carex × ilseana, also known as Ilse's sedge, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is a cross between Carex otrubae and Carex pilulifera. Traditionally, Ilse's sedge has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex × ilseana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and its rhizomes can be dried and used in teas, capsules, or as a powder for various health benefits.
